channel.title: Wildcard Domain on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Wildcard Domain on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure API Management Premium v2 and Standard v2 now support wildcard custom hostnames.
item.description:
Azure API Management Premium v2 and Standard v2 now support wildcard custom hostnames. This lets you use a wildcard domain and certificate for subdomains, reducing per-hostname setup and certificate management overhead.

  • Source: Azure Updates
